html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D5.DT.Polio contraindications decision table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: Draft Medication Request ID for bOPV dose
Poliovirus vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement required
Poliovirus vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement required Guidance
Poliovirus vaccination with bOPV is contraindicated Case 1
Poliovirus vaccination with bOPV is contraindicated Case 2
Poliovirus vaccination with bOPV is contraindicated
Poliovirus vaccination with bOPV is contraindicated Guidance

description.value: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D5.DT.Polio contraindications decision table in the Immunization CPG
